prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document appears to be primarily focused on educational guidance and funding mechanisms specific to England, as indicated by references to the Department for Education (DfE) and UKPRN, which is applicable to England. Scotland has its own education system and policy frameworks.
